description:
The image captures a serene night scene in a living room bathed in soft, dim lighting. The room is painted in a soothing shade of green, creating an atmosphere that is both calming and inviting. 

In the center of the room, a wooden coffee table takes prominence. It's draped with a white cloth, adding a touch of elegance to the setting. On top of the table, there are two objects: a blue vase and a black remote control. The vase stands out with its vibrant color against the muted tones of the room.

To the left, there's a window adorned with a yellow curtain that filters in a warm glow from outside, adding depth to the scene. A brown armchair is positioned next to the window, offering a cozy spot for relaxation or perhaps for enjoying the view outside.

On the right side of the room, another window with a white curtain can be seen. This window also allows some light to seep into the room, further enhancing the soft lighting that illuminates every corner of this tranquil living space.
